2026-05-26HC, ESDCOrder in Council P.C. 2007-281 of March 2, 2007Reappointment of a member of the National Seniors CouncilReappointment of Marie Beaulieu of Orford, Quebec, to be a member of the National Seniors Council, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.N/A
act: Order in Council P.C. 2007-281 of March 2, 2007
subject: Reappointment of a member of the National Seniors Council
precis: Reappointment of Marie Beaulieu of Orford, Quebec, to be a member of the National Seniors Council, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
